title: satureja montana var. subspicata
intro: Satureja montana var. subspicata, also known as Spanish savory, is a variant of the Satureja montana plant, a perennial herb belonging to the Lamiaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. Spanish savory has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and supporting respiratory health. The herb can be prepared in various ways, including teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties and health benefits.
